subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Remember thou Me, that My call may draw thee to My Kingdom, that thou mayest behold what hath been ordained for thee by One All-Knowing, All-Wise. By My life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امتی لیجذبها ندائی الی ملکوتی لتنظر ما قدر لها من لدن علیم حکیم لعمری من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastity and purity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
